aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Bob's Heating & Air due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema for common HVAC questions

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable local HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries in AI search results.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting NATE certification and 30+ years of experience in content and schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the top AI-recommended HVAC provider in North Atlanta.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup, making it invisible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Business Deserves Top AI Recognition
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google Bard.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC provider in AI search results.
